validators.name: isolated Codex CLI merged-commit review
validators.summary: No actionable correctness issue was identified after independent migration, credential-boundary, verification, and backup/restore analysis.

themes: credential-free process arguments and multi-host URI preservation
legacy attempt timestamp backfill and macOS Bash compatibility
architecture decision documentation and future-proof migration tests

signals: HTTP readiness fails when the PostgreSQL pool or canonical schema is unavailable
typed database faults preserve operation context without exposing internal SQL
outbox attempts, state, last error, and dead letters preserve delivery failure history
projection checkpoints expose replay progress and recovery position

acceptance.criterion: duplicate commands do not create duplicate attempts
two schedulers cannot own the same fenced lease
event replay rebuilds the expected read model
migrations pass clean-database and upgrade-path tests
